svg.text: Free after-sales service and loyalty discount are the must-win priorities — together addressing 78% of controllable loss
Five initiatives ranked by impact-to-cost ratio; concentrating budget on initiatives 01 and 02 will deliver the majority of the retention upside
FIVE INITIATIVES — RANKED LEFT TO RIGHT BY IMPACT-TO-COST RATIO
Source: Director A and Director B programme recommendations | Kimsoong European HQ
